abilities.name: Swift Step
shot_type: [[File:Ability target ui.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Targeted ability|Targeted ]] Targeted (ally) [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement

raw.shot type:
[[File:Ability target ui.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Targeted ability|Targeted ]] Targeted (ally)
[[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.ability details: * Swift Step can target allies through walls. * Swift Step has a brief casting animation that can be interrupted. * Objects that are attached to Kiriko are dropped at the cast location when she teleports. ** This includes [[File:Jagged_Blade_Icon.png|sub|link=Junker Queen#Jagged Blade|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Junker Queen#Jagged Blade|Jagged Blade]], [[File:Ability-hanzo2.png|sub|link=Hanzo#Sonic Arrow|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Hanzo#Sonic Arrow|Sonic Arrow]], [[File:Ability-tracer4.png|sub|link=Tracer#Pulse Bomb|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Tracer#Pulse Bomb|Pulse Bomb]], [[File:STICKY BOMBS.png|sub|link=Echo#Sticky Bombs|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Echo#Sticky Bombs|Sticky Bombs]], [[File:Take_Aim.png|middle|link=Freja#Take Aim|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Freja#Take Aim|Take Aim]] and [[File:Tracking Shot.png|sub|link=Sierra#Tracking Shot|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sierra#Tracking Shot|Tracking Shot]]. * Kiriko is briefly [[phased out]] after using Swift Step, making her immune to damage. * Swift Step can be used on airborne allies, such as Pharah. Kiriko will appear at their side and begin to fall immediately. * Swift Step cannot be used while Kiriko is under a movement lock effect such as [[File:Ability-Junkrat3.png|sub|link=Junkrat#Steel Trap|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Junkrat#Steel Trap|Steel Trap]], [[File:Abilities-sigma5.png|sub|link=Sigma#Gravitic Flux|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Gravitic Flux|Gravitic Flux]] or [[File:Ability-zarya4.png|sub|link=Zarya#Graviton Surge|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zarya#Graviton Surge|Graviton Surge]]

abilities.name: Protection Suzu
shot_type: [[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

raw.shot type:
[[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile
[[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect
raw.official description: Throw a protective charm to make allies become briefly invulnerable and cleansed of most negative effects.
raw.ability details: * Protection Suzu makes allies [[phased out]], making them immune to most negative effects and damage. They are not targetable by enemies and become non-physical. Abilities, such as [[File:Ability-Roadhog3.png|sub|link=Roadhog#Chain Hook|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Roadhog#Chain Hook|Chain Hook]], will pass through them. * Protection Suzu does not work on constructs like Torbjörn's [[File:Ability-torbjorn3.png|sub|link=Torbjörn#Deploy Turret|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Torbjörn#Deploy Turret|Turret]]. * The projectile can be destroyed while in air by [[File:Ability-dva3.png|sub|link=D.Va#Defense Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Defense Matrix|Defense Matrix]], [[File:Abilities-sigma3.png|sub|link=Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|Kinetic Grasp]], [[File:Ability_JavelinSpin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Javelin Spin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Javelin Spin|Javelin Spin]], [[File:Perk_PowerMatrix.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Power Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Power Matrix|Power Matrix]] and [[File:ULT Kekkai Sancturary.png|sub|link=Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|Kekkai Sanctuary]] and reflected by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]], but the explosion is unaffected. * [[File:Baptiste-ability4.png|sub|link=Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|Amplification Matrix]] affects all healing dealt, if the projectile passes through it. Area healing alone going through is not amplified. * Protection Suzu does not collide with enemies. * Protection Suzu, if thrown straight up, takes 7 seconds before it will impact the ground and trigger. * Following effects are prevented and removed by Protection Suzu: ** [[Anti-heal]], such as [[File:Ability-ana3.png|sub|link=Ana#Biotic Grenade|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ana#Biotic Grenade|Biotic Grenade]], [[File:Rampage_Icon.png|sub|link=Junker Queen#Rampage|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Junker Queen#Rampage|Rampage]] and [[File:Placeholder_ability_icon.png|sub|link=Global Passive Abilities#Healing reduction from damage|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Global Passive Abilities#Healing reduction from damage|Healing reduction from damage]] ** [[Damage over time]] effects, such as [[File:Ability-ashe2.png|sub|link=Ashe#Dynamite|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ashe#Dynamite|Dynamite]], [[File:Ability-widowmaker3.png|sub|link=Widowmaker#Venom Mine|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Widowmaker#Venom Mine|Venom Mine]] and [[Junker Queen]]'s wounds ** [[Stun]]s (incl. freeze), such as [[File:Ability_EnergyJavelin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Energy Javelin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Energy Javelin|Energy Javelin]] and [[File:Ability-mei4.png|sub|link=Mei#Blizzard|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mei#Blizzard|Blizzard]] ** Ana's [[File:Ability-ana2.png|sub|link=Ana#Sleep Dart|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ana#Sleep Dart|Sleep Dart]] ** Sombra's [[File:Ability Sombra Hack.png|sub|link=Sombra#Hack|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#Hack|Hack]] ** Zenyatta's [[File:Ability-zenyatta3.png|sub|link=Zenyatta#Orb of Discord|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zenyatta#Orb of Discord|Orb of Discord]] ** Illari's [[File:Captive_sun_icon.png|sub|link=Illari#Captive Sun|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Illari#Captive Sun|Captive Sun]] sunstruck debuff ** Attached objects, such as [[File:Jagged_Blade_Icon.png|sub|link=Junker Queen#Jagged Blade|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Junker Queen#Jagged Blade|Jagged Blade]], [[File:Ability-hanzo2.png|sub|link=Hanzo#Sonic Arrow|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Hanzo#Sonic Arrow|Sonic Arrow]], [[File:Ability-tracer4.png|sub|link=Tracer#Pulse Bomb|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Tracer#Pulse Bomb|Pulse Bomb]], [[File:STICKY BOMBS.png|sub|link=Echo#Sticky Bombs|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Echo#Sticky Bombs|Sticky Bombs]], [[File:Take_Aim.png|middle|link=Freja#Take Aim|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Freja#Take Aim|Take Aim]] and [[File:Tracking Shot.png|sub|link=Sierra#Tracking Shot|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sierra#Tracking Shot|Tracking Shot]]. ** Movement [[slow]]s, such as [[File:Ability-mei1.png|middle|link=Mei#Endothermic Blaster|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mei#Endothermic Blaster|Endothermic Blaster]] and [[File:Ability Doomfist Meteor Strike.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Meteor Strike|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Meteor Strike|Meteor Strike]] * Following effects are prevented but not removed by Protection Suzu: ** [[Knockdown]]s, such as [[File:Ability-reinhardt5.png|sub|link=Reinhardt#Earthshatter|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Reinhardt#Earthshatter|Earthshatter]] ** [[Knockback]]'s and knockups, such as [[File:Ability-Lucio5.png|sub|link=Lúcio#Soundwave|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lúcio#Soundwave|Soundwave]] ** Junkrat's [[File:Ability-Junkrat3.png|sub|link=Junkrat#Steel Trap|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Junkrat#Steel Trap|Steel Trap]] ** Reinhardt's [[File:Ability-reinhardt3.png|sub|link=Reinhardt#Charge|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Reinhardt#Charge|Charge]] ** Roadhog's [[File:Ability-Roadhog3.png|sub|link=Roadhog#Chain Hook|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Roadhog#Chain Hook|Chain Hook]] * Following effects are completely unaffected by Protection Suzu. Damage portions may still be prevented, but the effect will not end: ** Sigma's [[File:Abilities-sigma5.png|sub|link=Sigma#Gravitic Flux|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Gravitic Flux|Gravitic Flux]] ** Zarya's [[File:Ability-zarya4.png|sub|link=Zarya#Graviton Surge|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zarya#Graviton Surge|Graviton Surge]] ** Mauga's [[File:Cage_Fight_icon.png|sub|link=Mauga#Cage Fight|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mauga#Cage Fight|Cage Fight]] * Protection Suzu can affect allies through walls and floors as long as their bodies are sticking through them. * Destroys fences and other breakables in the area of effect.

raw.shot type: [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.official description: Jump at walls to climb up them.
raw.ability details:
* Wall Climb ends when the player stops holding the button, the wall ends or the duration is up. It cannot then be used again until the player has landed on a walkable surface.
* Kiriko will grab and mantle ledges if the input is held while facing a ledge of a walkable surface.
** This does not count as starting Wall Climb, and can be done even if Wall Climb was already used.
** Destroys fences and other breakables in the way when mantling a ledge.
* Can reach up to 10.3m height (11m with jump) due to momentum being kept after wall climb ends.

abilities.name: Healing Ofuda

raw.official description: Channel a burst of healing talismans that can seek targeted allies.
raw.ability details: * Healing per second: 182 while firing (80.53 w/ reload) * Default behavior is a toggle, meaning pressing the button will cause Kiriko to hold down the ability. If you don't want to use all 10 Healing Ofuda, you must press again to toggle off. This setting can be changed in the options. * After being thrown, the talismans are either yellow or blue. The color indicates whether they are homing in on a target. ** Yellow means they are seeking the allied player. ** Blue means they don't have a target. Blue ofuda can still heal an ally if they walk into the missed ofuda's path. * Healing Ofuda are destroyed upon impact with terrain (whether they were homing or not). * Healing Ofuda automatically reload when they are not in use or the clip is emptied. All 10 Ofuda are restored, regardless of how many Ofuda were left in the clip. * The max range for Healing Ofuda is the same as [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|sub|link=Kiriko#Swift Step|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Kiriko#Swift Step|Swift Step]], so you can use the indicator for that ability to determine if your Healing Ofuda is within range of homing in or not. * The maximum view angle for Healing Ofuda lock on is half that of [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|sub|link=Kiriko#Swift Step|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Kiriko#Swift Step|Swift Step]]. If [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|sub|link=Kiriko#Swift Step|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Kiriko#Swift Step|Swift Step]] sensitivity is set to 50%, then the presence of the [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|sub|link=Kiriko#Swift Step|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Kiriko#Swift Step|Swift Step]] reticle will also indicate an adequate viewing angle for Healing Ofuda lock-on. * Healing Ofuda will continue to home on targets even when they teleport or become untargetable by enemies, such as a [[File:Ability-reaper3.png|sub|link=Reaper#Shadow Step|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Reaper#Shadow Step|Shadow Stepping]] Reaper or a Moira using [[File:Ability Moira Fade.png|sub|link=Moira#Fade|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Moira#Fade|Fade]]. They are still limited by their max homing range. * Despite [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]] switching ownership to Genji, yellow ofudas will still try to seek their original target. If Genji's allies stand in their path, they will be healed. * Can destroy fences and other breakables when colliding with them.

abilities.name: Kitsune Rush
shot_type: [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

raw.shot type: [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect
raw.official description: Summon a fox spirit that rushes forward, accelerating the movement, attack speed, and cooldowns of allies that follow its path.
raw.ability details: * Grants +30% move speed, +50% reload and attack speed, and +100% cooldown recharge rate. ** The bonuses persist for 1 second after leaving the area. * Kitsune Rush's deployment is completely stopped if the fox spirit collides with terrain under certain conditions. Whatever path was laid prior to collision with terrain remains in effect. ** If the fox hits a surface at a low angle, it will slide along it, maintaining its original direction, instead of stopping. ** The fox can jump walls roughly up to Kiriko's height, but it will not cover gaps. If Kitsune Rush goes down a ledge, it will deploy along the ground beneath regardless of height. ** Destroys fences and other breakables in its path. * Kitsune Rush's deployment is not impacted by barriers and will pass through them. ** Terrain-like [[objects]], such as Mei's [[File:Ability-mei3.png|sub|link=Mei#Ice Wall|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mei#Ice Wall|Ice Wall]] and [[File:Ability-mei2.png|sub|link=Mei#Cryo-Freeze|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mei#Cryo-Freeze|Cryo-Freeze]] and Lifeweaver's [[File:Tree_of_Life_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Tree of Life|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Tree of Life|Tree of Life]], can block the deployment of Kitsune's Rush, regardless of whether the ability is from an ally or an enemy. * [[File:Ability-ashe4.png|sub|link=Ashe#B.O.B.|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ashe#B.O.B.|B.O.B]] receives the benefits of Kitsune Rush. ** Other [[deployables]], like Torbjorn's [[File:Ability-torbjorn3.png|sub|link=Torbjörn#Deploy Turret|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Torbjörn#Deploy Turret|Turret]] and Junkrat's [[File:Ability-Junkrat5.png|sub|link=Junkrat#RIP-Tire|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Junkrat#RIP-Tire|RIP-Tire]] do not receive any benefit. * Functions with [[File:Ability_Moira_Coalescence.png|sub|40x40px|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Beam|Beam ]] Beam-type weapons, such as [[File:Ability-winston1.png|middle|link=Winston#Tesla Cannon|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Winston#Tesla Cannon|Tesla Cannon]], by increasing the tick rate. * Works on abilities which have a rate of fire, such as [[File:Ability-hanzo03.png|sub|link=Hanzo#Storm Arrows|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Hanzo#Storm Arrows|Storm Arrows]] and [[File:Ability-Roadhog4.png|sub|link=Roadhog#Whole Hog|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Roadhog#Whole Hog|Whole Hog]]. * Speeds up the charge time of most weapons, such as [[File:Ability-hanzo1.png|middle|link=Hanzo#Storm Bow|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Hanzo#Storm Bow|Storm Bow]] and [[File:Healing_Blossom_Icon.png|middle|link=Lifeweaver#Healing Blossom|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Healing Blossom|Healing Blossom]]. * Kitsune Rush cannot be cancelled mid-animation by [[Crowd Control|stuns]], but getting killed or hacked mid-animation does. * Kitsune Rush's [[movement speed]] buff counts towards global movement speed buff cap.
